content.en:
"What deal?"

Ye Tian was a little curious and a little expectant.

Lord Ice Han said, "Endless Lord, you have obtained these inheritances, it should be the inheritance obtained in a certain ruin, I want to know the location of that ruin." "

"The location of the ruins. "

Ye Tian knew what Lord Binghan thought, which ruin he wanted to go to to get some benefits, but there were actually no treasures left in that ruin, at least he didn't find any treasures.

So, Ye Tian said: "Lord Binghan, that ruin has no resources, just a battlefield world, almost all of it is ruins, only some corpse fragments and building fragments of the Eternal Realm, I only found some useless inheritances in it, such ruins are of little value, even so, does Lord Binghan want to trade this piece of information?"

"Yes, even if it's just ruins, I want to see it. Lord Binghan nodded.

"Then what do I get?" Ye Tian asked.

Lord Binghan pondered for a moment, then said: "Endless Lord, I got information from here, and naturally I will also give you a piece of information, such as the location of another ruin, and that ruin still has some chances, which are of great value to the Immortal Realm Lord, and the Immortal Realm Lord may be able to get a lot of opportunities when he enters it." "

"Okay, I'm willing to trade!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Immediately, Ye Tian informed the location of the Silent Void Ruins World to Lord Binghan, and roughly explained some of the situation there.

"It's actually in the Void Beast Territory!" Lord Ice Han was dumbfounded, she thought that the ruins were in a strange void area far away from the Source Sea and the space-time territory, but she didn't expect it to be in the Void Beast's territory.

She stared at Ye Tian carefully and examined it carefully.

It was hard for her to think of how Ye Tian ran there, because there was a fifth-order void beast there, and the Immortal Realm Lord had no hope of entering that ruin at all, unless it was to condense a doppelganger for temptation, but who would dare to waste so many resources to condense a doppelganger, the price to pay was too great.

However, for her, she was not afraid of the fifth-order void beast.

She could completely break into that ruin world, and the fifth-order void beast would not be able to stop her, unless she mobilized multiple fifth-order void beasts to surround and kill her, but the void beast could not know the situation in advance, and this situation was almost non-existent.

Lord Binghan didn't break his promise either, and informed Ye Tian of another ruin.

After completing the transaction, Ye Tian left the Extreme Ice Pavilion.

Then, he prepared to go to the ruins that Lord Icehan had told him.

That ruin was not in the realm of time and space, otherwise it would have been impossible to hide for a long time, and almost all of them knew about it.

However, that relic is not far from the space-time territory, but the Void Region, the Eternal Realm, are very unsuitable for the environment of the Void Region, and there are no rules here, so the scope of exploration will not be very This will lead to a ruin in the Void Region, which is difficult to find.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to the ruins alone, without informing the other Eternal Realms.

As for what this ruin was, what danger it had, Ye Tian didn't know anything, but at most he would lose a replica body, so he didn't care at all.

Soon, Ye Tian entered the Void Zone, and performed the Void Step, shuttling through the Void Zone at an extremely fast speed, and soon arrived at the location where the ruins were.

......

Somewhere in the Void Zone, a black continent is suspended here, but if you don't get close to here, you can perceive it from a distance, and there is no trace of any continent at all.

When Ye Tian approached this continent, the surrounding void was distorted, and wisps of innate eternal rules appeared, and he immediately stepped on this black continent.

"Reversing time and space, this black continent is not simple~!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As far as he looked, his power sensed his surroundings, as if he was bound by layers of time and space, and every time his perception extended out, he had to shatter layers of time and space.

He lightly hammered the void with a punch, causing only faint ripples.

Obviously, the suppression of space, space and all things here has reached a terrifying level.

Whoa!!

Ye Tian shuttled a distance step by step, and soon came to a black mountain range in the center of the Black Continent, and in this black mountain range, there were black mountains, and each black mountain looked quite weird.

When Ye Tian approached Montenegro and saw the quaint stone tablets of each Montenegro, he knew that this place was not Montenegro at all, but a prison.

Every Black Mountain is a prison that binds the enemy, and it is precisely because of this that the binding and suppression of external objects here is so powerful, and the Black Mountain is the most terrifying seal, suppressing the enemy, so that the enemy can never be born.

Which force is this arrangement, Ye Tian has no way of researching, but he soon knows the meaning of Lord Binghan's words, this is also a place of chance for the Lord of the Immortal Realm, and he can get some opportunities, and chance is the enemy in these prisons.

[Lord of Qishui, the lord of the three-step immortal realm, once assassinated an immortal realm in the great battle, resulting in the defeat of the battle, suppressed in this endless years, for the disciples of Moshan to hone their eternal skills, the disciples of the lord of the immortal realm can enter it, and the strength will be suppressed to the same level as the lord of Qishui, and the lord of Qishui must not be killed, otherwise the contribution points will be deducted. 】

Lord Chenming, the lord of the six-step immortal realm, betrayed Moshan, was a traitor to Moshan, and was suppressed here, for the disciples of Moshan to hone their eternal skills, and the disciples of the Immortal Realm Lord can enter it......

Blood Dome Lord, a one-step legendary realm lord, once attacked and killed the disciples of Moshan, was captured here, suppressed for countless years, for the disciples of Moshan to hone the eternal level, and the lord of the legendary realm can enter it......

......

Ye Tian was extremely surprised when he saw the information recorded on the stone tablets.

The people who were suppressed and imprisoned here were all lords above the Immortal Realm, and there were even Legendary Realm Lords, and there was more than one.

Even the Legendary Realm Lord can be imprisoned, which shows how powerful this so-called Moshan is, but now Moshan may have declined, otherwise this place would not have become a ruin, and so far (good) there is no so-called Moshan force today.

"Moshan doesn't allow disciples to kill these prisoners, but now Moshan doesn't exist, so I can kill these prisoners, if I kill them, I can get the resources and treasures on their bodies, this should be the opportunity that Lord Binghan said, but ......"

Ye Tian knew very well that if these prisoners were still alive, he was afraid that they had experienced endless years of fighting, and they had fought against many heaven-defying immortal realms, and it would be extremely difficult to kill them if they had the same cultivation strength.

Those Immortal Realms in the space-time territory are afraid that they can't win, and the Legendary Realm Lords like the Ice Han Lord are afraid that they can't win those Legendary Realm prisoners.

Ye Tian didn't know if there were other opportunities in this black continent, but he was extremely interested in the enemies in these prisons, and even interested in fighting with them.

Subsequently, Ye Tian selected an Immortal Realm Lord prisoner.

Lord of Kisui Water!_
